title: TrustedShops Reviews Scraper
description: Extract TrustedShops reviews by batch TSIDs or profile URLs. One dataset item is written and charged per review.

tsids.title: TrustedShops TSIDs
tsids.description: TrustedShops shop TSIDs. Up to 50 shops per run.

urls.title: TrustedShops Profile URLs
urls.description: TrustedShops shop profile URLs containing info_<TSID>. Use this for batch monitoring from profile links.

tsid.title: Single TSID
tsid.description: Single TSID compatibility input. Ignored when TSIDs or Profile URLs are provided.

url.title: Single Profile URL
url.description: Single TrustedShops profile URL compatibility input.

market.title: Market
market.description: Optional TrustedShops market parameter when supported by the Scrappa endpoint.

page.title: Start Page
page.description: First TrustedShops reviews page to fetch.

max_pages.title: Maximum Pages
max_pages.description: Number of review pages to fetch per TSID.

size.title: Page Size
size.description: Reviews to request per page from Scrappa.

include_raw_responses.title: Include Raw Page Responses
include_raw_responses.description: Include full Scrappa page responses in the OUTPUT key-value-store record. Leave disabled for large batch runs.
